title: Device Home Screen - Device image updates after changing earcups
scenario: Device image on Device Home Screen does not update immediately after swapping earcups on Voyager Focus 2 UC
steps: Ensure a supported device (e.g., Voyager Focus 2 UC) with swappable earcups is connected
Swap the earcups on the connected device to a different color/style
Observe the device image displayed on the Home screen
expected: The device image on the Home screen updates immediately to reflect the newly attached earcups.
